/usr/bin/ar qc ../../../Lib/Package/libOnvif.a  CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/base64.c.o CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/commfun.c.o CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/hxml.c.o CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/onvif.c.o CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/onvif_discovery.c.o CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/onvif_error_respones.c.o CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/onvif_function.c.o CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/onvif_serve.c.o CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/onvif_threadpool.c.o CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/sha1.c.o CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/xml_get_data.c.o CMakeFiles/Onvif.dir/xml_node.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../../Lib/Package/libOnvif.a
